title: AutoStash
description: Quickly stash your items into designated chests with a command.
body:
# AutoStash

A simple quality-of-life mod that lets you stash your items into designated chests with a command.  
Keep your inventory tidy and let your storage handle the rest.

---

## Features
- Stash items into pre-defined chests with one command  
- Categorize chests to control what items go where  
- Easy setup with intuitive commands  
- Great for survival servers and co-op play  

---

## Important
Categories must be created before you can assign chests to them, altough I do have some premade ones. 

---

## Commands
- `/autostash category <name>` – Create or manage a category  
- `/autostash setchest <name> <category>` – Register a chest with a category  
- `/autostash removechest <name>` – Remove a chest from AutoStash  
- `/autostash cheststatus` – View all registered chests  
- `/stash` – Move items from your inventory into matching chests  

---

## Setup
1. Create one or more categories with `/autostash category <name>`  
2. Place a chest in the world  
3. Use `/autostash setchest <name> <category>` to assign it  
4. Add items to the category list  
5. Use `/stash` anytime to send items from your inventory into their chests  

---

## Categories
Items are grouped by categories you define.  
For example:
- Food → goes into your kitchen chest  
- Ores → into your mining chest  
- Blocks → into your building supplies chest  

---

## Compatibility
- Fabric Loader required  
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer  
- Compatible with most Fabric mods
